since_last: 48% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.96%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.85% · Gold -0.15% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 48% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.96%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.96%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.40%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.03%
cards.body: Leaders: PWR +5.52%, BIDU +2.92%, AVAV +2.68%, OKTA +1.88%, NOW +1.88%. Laggards: SKHY -6.03%, ARM -4.70%, TSM -4.12%, DELL -3.35%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.43% at $135.85
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
